headline: Transparency Declaration Notification
summary: Regulated information In accordance with the requirements of Article 14 of the Belgian Law of May 2, 2007 on the disclosure of significant shareholdings in listed companies, Ontex Group NV (“Ontex”) discloses the notifications of significant shareholding by the Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. On April 15, 2026, Ontex received a transparency declaration confirming that, on April 10, 2026, the Goldman Sachs Group, Inc., detained 116,325 Ontex voting rights and 2,461,101 equivalent financial instruments

headline: Goldman Sachs initiates Dynatrace at buy as AI reshapes observability
summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs has initiated coverage of Dynatrace and Elastic, rating the former a buy with a $45 price target and the latter neutral with a $50 price target, as analyst Matthew Martino argues that artificial intelligence is fundamentally reshaping the enterprise observability market.

headline: World Insurance Associates Names John Newell as Chief Executive Officer; Founder Rich Eknoian New Executive Chairman
summary: World Insurance Associates (World), a leading insurance brokerage and financial services firm, today announced that John Newell will join World as chief executive officer, succeeding founder and long-time CEO Rich Eknoian, who established World in 2011. headline: How The Royal Caribbean (RCL) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Reset
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises now carries a slightly lower modeled fair value of US$348.46, down from US$362.04, a reduction of about US$13.58 in the latest update. This shift sits within a lively period of Street debate, where some major banks have been lifting targets into the US$370s while others have issued cuts as large as US$50. As you read on, you will see how these opposing calls fit together and how to keep track of the story as it evolves. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Royal...

headline: How The Amneal Pharmaceuticals (AMRX) Story Is Evolving Around 2026 Guidance And US$17 Targets
summary: The central price target for Amneal Pharmaceuticals has shifted from a fair value of US$16.80 to about US$17.17, signaling a modest recalibration in where analysts see the shares settling. Recent Q4 commentary and the new 2026 outlook sit at the core of this change, as research desks weigh strong EBITDA guidance against mixed segment performance. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the current narrative and what to watch to stay aligned with it. Analyst Price Targets...
